title: gitmap-v27 list-releases --json output
description: Array of release records for the current repository. Sourced from .gitmap/release/v*.json metadata files, git tags, and the SQLite cache (in that priority order). Sorted by createdAt descending (newest first). Empty result is encoded as `[]` (NOT `null`) so jq pipelines can `length` without conditionals. Backed by gitmap-v27/stablejson — key order is contractual and pinned by gitmap-v27/cmd/listreleases_jsonschema_contract_test.go. Companion schema list-releases-all-repos.schema.json covers the `--all-repos` joined view (different shape).

items.title: Release record
items.description: A single release. Field names mirror model.ReleaseRecord's `json:` struct tags exactly so the wire format stays byte-compatible with the legacy json.MarshalIndent surface.

id.description: SQLite primary key. 0 for records sourced from filesystem-only metadata that have not yet been cached to the DB; non-zero once cached.

repoId.description: Foreign key to the Repo table (v17+). 0 for filesystem-only records.

version.description: Semantic version string without the leading `v` (e.g. `4.14.0`). Always non-empty for repo-sourced records; may equal the parsed value of the tag for tag-sourced records.

tag.description: Git tag exactly as it appears in `git tag -l` (e.g. `v4.14.0`). Primary deduplication key.

branch.description: Release branch name. Always `release-v<version>` for tag-sourced records; mirrors the metadata file value for repo-sourced records.

sourceBranch.description: Branch the release was cut from (typically `main`). Empty for tag-sourced records.

commitSha.description: Full 40-character commit SHA the release points at. Empty for tag-sourced records that don't yet have metadata.

changelog.description: Newline-joined changelog body. Empty when the metadata file omits the `changelog` array or for tag-sourced records.

notes.description: Free-form release notes. Empty by default.

isDraft.description: True when the metadata file's `isDraft` field is set. Tag-sourced records are always false.

isPreRelease.description: True when the metadata file's `isPreRelease` field is set. Tag-sourced records are always false.

isLatest.description: True for the single record matching .gitmap/release/latest.json. At most one record per array has this set; downstream filters can rely on that uniqueness.

source.description: Provenance: `repo` = .gitmap/release/v*.json, `tag` = git tag with no metadata file, `release` / `import` = DB-cached records from earlier runs or external imports.

createdAt.description: ISO-8601-ish timestamp string used for sort. Format follows the metadata file (`2006-01-02T15:04:05Z07:00` for repo records; tagger date for tag records). Lexicographic sort matches chronological order for both formats.
